Name: test_PA01_page_limit_one
Description: page_limit=1 returns at most 1 item.

Name: test_SS11_operator_and
Description: Multiple search options with operator='and' narrows search.

Name: test_EC03_all_three_search_options_with_or
Description: Using visual, audio, and transcription together with or does not error.

Name: test_PI01_transcription_options_with_non_transcription_search
Description: transcription_options has no effect when search_options excludes transcription.

Name: test_PA06_retrieve_expired_token_raises_error
Description: search.retrieve() with an obviously invalid token raises ApiError.

Name: test_EC02_long_query_text_within_limit
Description: A long but valid query (well under 500 tokens) is accepted.

Name: test_EH03_page_limit_exceeds_maximum_raises_bad_request
Description: page_limit=51 (above the max of 50) should raise BadRequestError.

Name: test_SS04_text_search_audio
Description: Text query with audio search option returns a valid response.

Name: test_FI02_filter_by_nonexistent_video_id_raises_bad_request
Description: Filtering by a video ID not in the index raises a 400 BadRequestError.

Name: test_SS02_text_search_visual
Description: Text query with visual search option returns a valid response.

Name: test_EH02_invalid_api_key_raises_api_error
Description: An invalid API key should raise an ApiError.

Name: test_EC01_query_with_no_likely_match_returns_empty
Description: A highly improbable query returns an empty list gracefully.

Name: test_TR02_transcription_semantic_only
Description: transcription_options=['semantic'] performs meaning-based matching.

Name: test_SS09_group_by_clip_explicit
Description: group_by='clip' explicitly returns ungrouped clips.

Name: test_TR01_transcription_lexical_only
Description: transcription_options=['lexical'] performs exact-word matching.

Name: test_SS03_text_search_transcription
Description: Text query with transcription search option returns a valid response.

Name: test_PA03_page_info_limit_per_page_matches_request
Description: page_info.limit_per_page reflects the requested page_limit.

Name: test_EH04_invalid_filter_syntax_raises_bad_request
Description: A malformed filter string should raise BadRequestError.

Name: test_SS05_response_contains_page_info
Description: SearchResults.page_info is populated.

Name: test_FI01_filter_by_duration_range
Description: Filter by duration range accepts valid JSON filter string.

Name: test_FI03_filter_by_video_id_from_results
Description: Filter by a video_id extracted from a prior search returns only that video.

Name: test_PA04_next_page_token_present_when_more_results
Description: next_page_token is set when total_results > page_limit.

Name: test_EH05_empty_search_options_raises_bad_request
Description: An empty search_options list should raise BadRequestError.

Name: test_SS12_include_user_metadata_true
Description: include_user_metadata=True does not raise and returns results.

Name: test_SS07_group_by_clip_is_default
Description: Without group_by, items are returned as clips (no nested clips list).

Name: test_EH06_unsupported_search_option_raises_bad_request
Description: An unsupported value in search_options should raise BadRequestError.

Name: test_EH01_nonexistent_index_id_raises_api_error
Description: A non-existent index_id should raise an ApiError (404).

Name: test_PA05_retrieve_next_page_via_token
Description: search.retrieve() returns a valid page when given a next_page_token.

Name: test_SS01_returns_search_results_type
Description: search.create() returns a SearchResults object.

Name: test_EH08_page_limit_zero_raises_bad_request
Description: page_limit=0 (below the minimum of 1) should raise BadRequestError.

Name: test_EH07_empty_query_text_raises_bad_request
Description: An empty string for query_text should raise BadRequestError.

Name: test_TR03_transcription_both_options
Description: transcription_options=['lexical', 'semantic'] is the default and works.

Name: test_EC05_result_ranks_are_sequential
Description: Results are returned in rank order (1, 2, 3, ...).

Name: test_SS06_search_item_structure_clip_mode
Description: Each SearchItem in clip mode has the expected fields.

Name: test_PA02_page_limit_max
Description: page_limit=50 (maximum) returns at most 50 items.

Name: test_SS08_group_by_video_returns_grouped_items
Description: group_by='video' yields items with an id and a clips list.

Name: test_SS10_operator_or
Description: Multiple search options with operator='or' broadens search.

Name: test_SS13_include_user_metadata_false
Description: include_user_metadata=False does not raise and returns results.

Name: test_EC04_page_limit_one_returns_at_most_one_item
Description: page_limit=1 returns exactly 0 or 1 items.
